content: Phase 1: Foundation Fixes - Resolve duplicate operator, add C++ validation, fix parallel utilities
Phase 2: Critical Safety Fixes - Numerical stability, division by zero, memory checks
Phase 3: API Fixes - Function name conflicts, missing functions
Phase 4: High Priority Fixes - Memory efficiency, NA handling, platform support
Phase 5: Medium Priority - Standardization and optimization
Add error handling to Taylor expansion
Fix integer overflow in memory calculation
Phase 6: Interface Improvements - Parameter names, documentation
